catalog.flavor: The first bolt every apprentice learns: raw Weave, shaped into a dart and flung. Cheap, quick, reliable.
catalog.name: Arcane Dart

catalog.flavor: A pinch of coaxed flame that clings and smoulders. Weak on impact, but the burn does the real work.
catalog.name: Ember

catalog.flavor: A splinter of hard-frozen air. Bites deeper than a dart and leaves a cold ache in the wound.
catalog.name: Frost Shard

catalog.flavor: A bursting spore-pod from the deep marsh. The petals rot flesh long after they land.
catalog.name: Toxic Bloom

catalog.flavor: A rolling sheet of fire that breaks over a crowd. The first spell worth its mana against a pack.
catalog.name: Flame Wave

catalog.flavor: A lance of blessed light from the Radiant Synod. It sears the living and scours the undead.
catalog.name: Hallowed Bolt

catalog.flavor: A sharp word of unmaking. Snuffs out an enemy spell mid-cast - the duelist's art of the Prism Collegium.
catalog.name: Counterspell

catalog.flavor: You call the sky down onto a point. Thunder answers, and everything nearby is thrown into the arc.
catalog.name: Storm Call

catalog.flavor: A finger of the grave's cold. What it marks begins to die slowly, from the inside out.
catalog.name: Grave Touch

catalog.flavor: A spear of ancient ice, driven clean through a single foe. Heavy mana, heavier impact.
catalog.name: Glacial Spike

catalog.flavor: Ravenous vines erupt from the target, feeding on it as they grow. Nature takes what it is owed.
catalog.name: Wildgrowth

catalog.flavor: A dart of unmade space. It does not burn or freeze — it simply removes what it touches.
catalog.name: Void Bolt

catalog.flavor: A sunrise in miniature. Radiant fire blooms outward, cleansing a whole knot of enemies at once.
catalog.name: Dawnburst

catalog.flavor: The sky splits and molten rock rains down. Few things stand in the crater it leaves behind.
catalog.name: Cataclysm

catalog.flavor: A scythe of pure death magic that reaps a single soul in one devastating stroke.
catalog.name: Soul Harvest

catalog.flavor: A fragment of a true sun, called down by the Radiant Synod. It immolates everything in a blinding sphere of light.
catalog.name: Sun Flare

catalog.flavor: The Prism Collegium's forbidden capstone: a single point of annihilation aimed at one unlucky target.
catalog.name: Oblivion
